issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card text says '[When Attacking]' which indicates OnAttack trigger.

Action is completely wrong. Text does not Rest characters; it prevents them from becoming active during opponent's next Refresh Phase. This requires a duration-based effect that blocks the Refresh action, not a Rest action.
Target scope is incorrect. Should target rested Characters only (HasRestingDon condition), not just any character with cost ≤1. Text explicitly says 'rested Characters'.

Effect structure missing: needs a condition to filter for rested characters and a mechanism to prevent activation during opponent's next Refresh Phase (likely requiring a duration state or blocked-from-refresh marker).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 1 or less will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.
